task_matrix: Encoder baseline: argument and stance classification
Retrieval: semantic linking and citation-search support

datasets.measurement: held-out F1/accuracy proxy from repo-side contracts
datasets.notes: Tracks the NZ Hansard argument/stance workload without gold evidence.

datasets.measurement: fixture query coverage and schema validation
datasets.notes: Deterministic NZ retrieval fixture used as a local benchmark proxy.
Provides a local boundary for what can be fine-tuned and published later.

metrics.description: Argument component quality on NZ Hansard text
metrics.notes: Use to compare encoder candidates in Track 53 context.

metrics.description: Stance classification accuracy on NZ debate text
metrics.notes: Must remain separated from gold-label claims.
Approximates candidate value for search and ranking work.

metrics.description: Inference cost for local or air-gapped use
metrics.notes: Important for CPU-only and small-GPU deployment decisions.

hardware_constraints.description: Candidate must be usable in a local CPU or small-GPU setup.
Candidate may require a local host or API access but must not be treated as gold evidence.
No NZ sensitive text should be sent to external services without explicit review.
